Happy Birthday, Diluc!
#GenshinImpact #Diluc 

You've done enough today. I only intended for you to taste the vineyard's grapes, but you ended up helping with the harvest as well.
The grapes have turned out well this year, perfect for testing a new brewing technique.
Sit here for a moment, if you like. I set some aside while sorting...
And the grapes you picked are now pressed into juice. Try it — see how your efforts turned out. Sweet enough?
